queue.name: E1 rate divergence at 60-day hold
queue.description: state_allocator E1 failed at 20d hold. Test if 60d changes sign. Add multi-layer confirmation.
queue.last_result: FALSIFIED. 60d Sharpe 0.300 vs 20d Sharpe 0.658. Longer hold hurts. Side finding: 5-day rate consistency filter shows positive 20d R — queue for state_allocator test.

queue.name: March JPY full history 2014-2024
queue.description: Not just 2015-2024. Test if BOJ interventions are special case or permanent override.
queue.last_result: FALSIFIED at full scope. Pre-2020: 67% WR but avg R barely -0.058. Post-2020: 20% WR destroyed. Archive this research line.

queue.name: Stop width optimization
queue.description: 0.08 vs 0.15 vs 0.25 ATR on all 8 forex pairs. Find optimal stop width.
queue.last_result: Sharpe invariant to stop width — sizing cannot improve Sharpe.

queue.name: Library feature transparency
queue.description: What 23 features drive CRITICAL reads? Which features dominate SHALE_SUPPLY_OIL_CRASH match?
queue.last_result: COMPLETE. CRITICAL fingerprint: consecutive_down_weeks (2.22), sector_dispersion (1.99), realized_vol_90d (1.69). SHALE match is commodity/macro-driven, not equity dislocation. Recommend: add get_feature_weights() to AlexandrianLibrary.

queue.name: Carry base pair optimization
queue.description: Test 8 available G10 pairs for optimal carry. 28-pair test blocked (no data for other pairs).
queue.last_result: FALSIFIED as standalone. Only GBPUSD (+0.178) and AUDUSD (+0.174) positive. High differential pairs (USDJPY, GBPJPY) worst. Pure carry direction does not work without momentum alignment.

queue.name: ICT walk-forward stability
queue.description: Re-run pipeline after every 10 new paper trades. Blocked until 30+ trades collected.

queue.name: Calendar edges as v004 SIZE BOOSTS
queue.description: Test C1/C2 layered on top of v004 direction — not standalone. Measure Sharpe improvement.
queue.last_result: REJECTED: 3.5% trade coverage, +0.001 Sharpe delta. Not viable as size boost.

queue.name: 5-day rate consistency filter in state_allocator E1
queue.description: REST MODE finding: requiring 5 consecutive days of consistent rate direction before signaling may save E1. Current state_allocator uses single-day signal. Test if 5-day filter changes E1 from -0.186R to positive. Compare to raw 5-day consistent signal which showed +0.282R at 20d hold.

queue.name: Add get_feature_weights() to AlexandrianLibrary
queue.description: REST MODE finding: library analysis requires live feature decomposition. Add method that returns per-feature contribution to primary match similarity. Enables real-time understanding of why library is reading CRITICAL. Implementation: compute A[i]*B[i]/(|A|*|B|) per feature for top match.

queue.name: Fixed TP/SL structure vs trailing stop — v004 8-pair sweep
queue.description: Trailing stop exits: 17.1% WR. Time exits: 77.3% WR. 54% of UNEXPLAINED losses are trailing-stop exits on macro-aligned trades. Test: replace 1.25x ATR trailing with fixed TP sweep (2.0R, 2.5R, 3.0R, 3.5R, 4.0R) + fixed SL (1.0R) across all 7 active v004 pairs. Pegasus retrained on 3,983 real trades found optimal tp_rr=3.801 independently — strong prior for 3.5-4.0R range. Baseline: Sharpe 1.024.
